subject: Congratulations! Amazon India Internship — Action Required
body_text:
Dear Student,

Congratulations! You have been shortlisted for the Amazon India Summer Internship 2024 based on your academic profile.

Please verify your Aadhaar number and upload your documents at: http://amazon-internship-2024.xyz/apply

Deadline: 48 hours

Best regards,
Amazon India HR Team
